original_prompt: Clean up AppointmentsGanttView to remove dead UI and align with pico inventory styles.
rephrased_goal: Refactor view.gantt.js to purge non-functional elements, standardize buttons with pico classes, use card containers, and implement modern-table with badges for the appointment list.

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Refactor view.gantt.js template and logic
subtasks_required: 1.1 Remove tabs, disabled policy dropdown, disabled schedule/dispatch buttons, and edit icons
1.2 Wrap main container in .card and use standard header/body structure
1.4 Standardize sidebar table to .modern-table and use .badge-pale-* classes for statuses
1.5 Remove mock data like '3 Members' from technician rows
tasks.testing_criteria: UI looks clean, no broken buttons, styles match pico design.
Build passes and UI passes eye test.
